summary: Editorial float layout for VFXAbout section verified across desktop, tablet, and mobile viewports. Title 'About Ripple VFX' and image are vertically aligned at the top (both y=46 on desktop). Image floats right at 45% container width with 2rem left margin on desktop. Text wraps around the image; last paragraph expands to full 1280px container width (clear-both works). On tablet (768px) and mobile (390px), image un-floats and stacks above text. All 6 paragraphs render, scroll-animate visibility triggers (8 visible), and 2 decorative pulse borders are present.
passed: Title 'About Ripple VFX' visible at top of #about section
Title top (y=46) equals Image top (y=46) — same vertical level
Image positioned on right side (x=1024, right of center 960)
All 6 paragraphs of About text present
Last paragraph width = 1280px (full container) — clear-both works after image
Text visually wraps around floated image (confirmed via desktop screenshot)
Tablet 768px: float=none, image stacks above text (image y=188 < first-p y=540)
Mobile 390px: float=none, image stacks above text (image y=168 < first-p y=520)
Scroll animations trigger — 8 scroll-animate elements have 'visible' class
2 decorative animate-pulse white border boxes present
notes:
The float wrapping is confirmed visually via desktop screenshot — the raw

bounding box reads full-width (block-level behavior), but inline text content is correctly pushed by the floated image, producing the intended magazine-style wrap. Pre-existing browser console errors (Cloudflare Turnstile 600010, 401 audio/video adapters) are unrelated to this feature.
